ast.name: error
ast.source: pdf-printer: could not generate canvas or context

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Quality of the printed images. Higher values result in better quality but larger file sizes.
ast.target: 打印图像的质量。值越高，质量越好，但文件大小也越大。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Place printed images from PDFs in this folder.
ast.target: 将PDF中打印的图像放置在此文件夹中。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Keep a link to the original PDF above the printed images as a reference.
ast.target: 在打印的图像上方保留指向原始PDF的链接作为参考。

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Show link to original PDF above printed images
ast.target: 在打印的图像上方显示指向原始PDF的链接

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: No images could be generated from the document.
ast.target: 无法从文档生成任何图像。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Please select a valid PDF file link.
ast.target: 请选择一个有效的PDF文件链接。
